tools.name: system_services
tools.description: List systemd services and status. Optional filter: 'all' | 'running' | 'active' | 'dead' | 'failed'

tools.name: system_service
tools.description: Get details for one systemd service

tools.name: system_service_restart
tools.description: Restart one systemd service

tools.name: system_service_start
tools.description: Start one systemd service

tools.name: system_service_stop
tools.description: Stop one systemd service

tools.name: system_service_enable
tools.description: Enable one systemd service at boot

tools.name: system_service_disable
tools.description: Disable one systemd service at boot

tools.name: check_process
tools.description: Check if a process or application is running by name using pgrep. Use for GUI apps, executables, and non-systemd processes like gnome-calculator, firefox, vlc, python.

tools.name: kill_process
tools.description: Kill a running process by friendly app name or process name using pkill. Use for GUI apps and non-systemd executables, for example calculator, firefox, vlc, or python. Do NOT use for systemd services — use system_service_stop for those.

tools.name: launch_app
tools.description: Launch a GUI application by friendly name or executable name. Use for desktop apps like calculator, firefox, files, terminal, spotify, or vlc. Web-only services such as youtube are resolved upstream to xdg_open. Do NOT use for systemd services — use system_service_start for those.

tools.name: firewall_status
tools.description: Get firewall status

tools.name: firewall_rule
tools.description: Get one firewall rule by rule id

tools.name: firewall_reload
tools.description: Reload firewall rules

tools.name: system_users
tools.description: List system users

tools.name: system_user
tools.description: Get one system user

tools.name: system_user_refresh
tools.description: Refresh user state

tools.name: network_interfaces
tools.description: List network interfaces

tools.name: network_interface
tools.description: Get one network interface

tools.name: network_interface_restart
tools.description: Restart network interface

tools.name: theme_themes
tools.description: List available themes

tools.name: theme_theme
tools.description: Get one theme

tools.name: set_theme
tools.description: Apply one theme through the deterministic theme service

tools.name: theme_apply
tools.description: Apply one theme

tools.name: system_status
tools.description: Get CPU, memory, disk, and uptime

tools.name: get_disk_partitions
tools.description: List all disk partitions with device, mountpoint, filesystem type, total/used/free bytes, and percent used

tools.name: get_system_settings
tools.description: Get the system hostname

tools.name: get_logs
tools.description: Get recent system journal logs. Optional lines parameter (1-500, default 100)

tools.name: get_error_logs
tools.description: Get recent system error logs filtered to error/warning level

tools.name: search_packages
tools.description: Search apt packages by name or keyword. Returns matching packages and descriptions

tools.name: installed_packages
tools.description: Check whether a specific package is installed. Pass package name as q

tools.name: get_network_status
tools.description: List all network interfaces with IP addresses, state, and connection info
